summary: Weather controls, smarter location lookup, combined multi-country news, and clearer public holiday labels on the Dashboard.

introduced: Change location button on the weather panel — enter a city or postcode, or switch back to your device location
Manual city/postcode entry appears while GPS lookup is still running if finding your location takes a while
News feed combines headlines from your detected country and every public-holiday country you follow
changed: Sync button on the weather panel refreshes today's forecast without reloading the whole Dashboard
News feed title shows which countries the headlines come from, e.g. Australia and Indonesia
Public holiday section titles read naturally — Public holidays in Roseville, Australia and Indonesia
News feed height matches the full left context panel (weather, resource usage, and cloud sync)
Weather location lookup no longer fires duplicate GPS requests while a fix is already in progress
